summary: Rebuilt fractalGrowthWireframe as a recursive 3D L-system tree structure. Created new generator (lSystemTree.ts) implementing a 3D turtle-interpreted L-system with axiom F → F[+F][-F][^F][&F], seeded angle jitter, branch pruning, and length decay. Swapped fractalGrowthWireframe to use the new generator (drop-in replacement via identical output interface). Added bass growth pulse (aRandom.y depthRatio) to both vertex shaders so tips expand more on bass hits. Added treble-driven tip sparkle to the vertex dot shader. Changed fragment shader spatial gradient from X-axis to radial distance for trunk-to-tip color mapping (blue→orange). Added 'lSystemTree' as third strategy in fractalGeometry.ts. Updated fractalGeometry tests to expect 3 strategies. All 2293 tests pass, build clean.
